body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/dataSource/deleteMultilevelSourceByIds 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/dataSource/deleteMultilevelSourceByIds 
 ## 接口描述 
数据源批量删除 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"请求头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"body","exampleValue":"%5B%20%22SOUR01%22%5D","desc":"%E8%A6%81%E5%88%A0%E9%99%A4%E7%9A%84%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%90id%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8%EF%BC%8C%E6%AF%8F%E4%B8%AA%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%90ID%E9%95%BF%E5%BA%A6%E4%B8%8A%E9%99%90128","label":"要删除的数据源id列表","required":true},"children":[]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"query根节点"},"children":[]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"响应头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"响应体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":false,"label":"%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E6%A0%87%E5%BF%97","exampleValue":"true","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":false,"label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%90%E6%89%B9%E9%87%8F%E5%88%A0%E9%99%A4%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","desc":""}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 ###请求示例
{BaseURL}/api/itrip-gateway/v1/dataSource/deleteMultilevelSourceByIds
```json
  ["SOUR01"]
```
###返回示例
```json
{ 
	   "success":  true,
	   "message":   "数据源批量删除成功"
}
```  
## 错误码说明 
| **错误码** | **错误描述**        | **备注**                       |
|------------|------------------------|-------------------------------------------|
| 400      | 请联系管理员配置企业信息 | 无                            |
| ERR0000      | 解密失败 | 无                            |
body.docCntHtml:
接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/dataSource/deleteMultilevelSourceByIds

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/dataSource/deleteMultilevelSourceByIds

接口描述

数据源批量删除

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"请求头根节点"}}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"body","exampleValue":"%5B%20%22SOUR01%22%5D","desc":"%E8%A6%81%E5%88%A0%E9%99%A4%E7%9A%84%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%90id%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8%EF%BC%8C%E6%AF%8F%E4%B8%AA%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%90ID%E9%95%BF%E5%BA%A6%E4%B8%8A%E9%99%90128","label":"要删除的数据源id列表","required":true},"children":[]}],"requestQuery":[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"query根节点"},"children":[]}]}

接口输出参数

{"responseHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"响应头根节点"}}],"responseBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"响应体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":false,"label":"%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E6%A0%87%E5%BF%97","exampleValue":"true","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":false,"label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%BA%90%E6%89%B9%E9%87%8F%E5%88%A0%E9%99%A4%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","desc":""}}]}]}

接口调用示例

###请求示例 {BaseURL}/api/itrip-gateway/v1/dataSource/deleteMultilevelSourceByIds

  ["SOUR01"]

###返回示例

{ 
	   "success":  true,
	   "message":   "数据源批量删除成功"
}

错误码说明

错误码 错误描述 备注
400 请联系管理员配置企业信息 无
ERR0000 解密失败 无
